non_utf8_output.message: Unable to handle non-utf8 output of command: `{command}`

timeout.message: Timed out running command: `{command}`, after: {timeout} seconds

reserved_reload_name.description: The shell_command name /'{name}/' is now reserved for the reload service and cannot be used for user-defined commands. Please rename or remove this entry from your configuration.
reserved_reload_name.title: Reserved shell_command name: {name}

reload.description: Reloads shell commands from the YAML configuration.
reload.name: Reload
